---
title: "Juan Pablo Benavides"
---

# About me

I am currently a PhD student at the University of Exerter, working in the Geography Deparment in Lucy Rowland's and Fernanda de Vaconsellos Barros's group.

![](features/images/JuanP_EdenProject.jpeg){fig-alt="Photo of Juan in Eden Project" fig-align="left" width="5cm"}

Website develop on [Quarto](https://quarto.org/docs/websites){.uri}.
